offer: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, delays in claim processing cause client dissatisfaction. We streamline the submission and tracking of claims instead of manual tracking and submission of claims via email and spreadsheets.
problem: Delays in claim processing lead to client dissatisfaction.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Participate in community forums for insurance tools
try_it: Let users try claim submission form and status tracking dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Reduce onboarding steps for new users
